_comment: Example .nilsson/config.json `project` descriptor (issue #9). Copy the `project` block into your project's .nilsson/config.json to replace the default. When this block is absent, Nilsson auto-defaults to the bundled minesweeper at examples/minesweeper/ (so a fresh boot serves a working game on :7700 — replace by adding the block below). Pick a `port` that is NOT Nilsson's port — the run_local workflow refuses on collision.

project._remote_example: Set target to 'remote' and fill remote.url to serve it elsewhere. A future run_remote workflow will use remote.sync as a pluggable preview hook.

sync: cd app && git fetch origin && git checkout -B preview origin/preview && sudo systemctl restart app
